summary: Frontend-only testing of redesigned light-theme Finda landing page and verification that dark-theme dashboard pages (chat, reminders) still work. All 14 requested test scenarios passed via Playwright. Landing renders with white background (#FFFFFF), Finda navbar (logo + Features/How it Works/About Us links + Login + Get Started), hero with badge/heading/description/CTA buttons + mock UI card on right + 'No credit card required' note, 3 feature cards (AI Chat, AI Learning, Smart Reminders), How it Works numbered steps with connecting line, and Bottom CTA. All navigation buttons route correctly: hero Get Started, nav Get Started, CTA Get Started -> /auth/register; Try Demo -> /chat; nav Log in -> /auth/login. Chat page (/chat) and Reminders page (/reminders) load with dark theme (rgb(33,33,33)) and left Sidebar present.

issues: Sidebar logo tile uses green (emerald) accent while landing brand color is dark blue #193B68. Minor brand inconsistency between landing and authenticated pages — not a regression since dashboard pages were intentionally kept on dark theme, but main agent may want to align logo color across themes.

critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx (~300 lines) is well-structured into Navbar/Hero/HeroMockUI/Features/HowItWorks/BottomCTA sub-components — good separation. No file-size or DRY issues.
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes (nav-login, nav-get-started, hero-get-started, hero-try-demo, cta-get-started, feature-card-*) — excellent testability.
useScrollFadeIn hook is duplicated state pattern across sections; consider extracting to a shared hooks file if reused elsewhere — minor.
Anchor links #features / #how-it-works / #about correctly target section ids.

App.js: the dashboard wrapper applies bg-[#212121] to every route including '/'; LandingPage uses its own min-h-screen bg-white container which correctly overrides inside <main>, but body could briefly flash dark on initial paint. Consider conditionally applying bg only when sidebar is shown.
test_credentials: N/A — auth flows are mocked client-side per request
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page is a static React light-theme component at /app/frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.jsx with full data-testid coverage. All routes verified working: / (light), /auth/login, /auth/register, /chat, /reminders, /feedback (last three render with dark theme + Sidebar). Auth and chat APIs are MOCKED client-side. Only minor design observation: Sidebar uses green logo color while Landing uses dark blue #193B68. No retesting required.
